name: Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening for 30 seconds.
2. Add sugar and beat until light and fluffy, well combined.
3. Alternately add the dry ingredients with water, a little at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Mix in the raisins.
5. Bake in a large greased loaf pan for 45 minutes at 325°F.
